about.title: About Our Company
about.body: We specialize in recruiting professional drivers and skilled workers for leading logistics companies in Germany. Our team supports candidates throughout the entire process from application to employment.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide our work and define our commitment to excellence
values.trustBody: Building lasting relationships through honest communication and ethical practices
values.empoweringBody: Supporting professionals in achieving their career goals and personal growth
values.innovationBody: Leveraging technology to streamline processes and deliver better outcomes
values.partnershipsBody: Creating sustainable relationships with candidates and employers alike

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive recruitment solutions tailored to your needs
services.talentBody: End-to-end recruitment services connecting you with top-tier professional drivers and logistics workers
services.workforceBody: Complete workforce solutions including compliance tracking, performance monitoring, and development programs
services.marketingBody: Strategic employer branding and candidate attraction campaigns across multiple channels
services.techHiringBody: Advanced applicant tracking and compliance management systems for efficient recruitment

jobs.title: Current Job Opportunities
jobs.subtitle: Explore exciting career opportunities with our partner companies across Germany

cta.title: Start Your Career in Germany
cta.body: Join our growing community of professionals building successful careers across Europe. We handle all legal documentation, provide visa support, and ensure a smooth transition to your new role.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Our team is ready to assist you with your recruitment journey

jobs.heroSubtitle: Browse our latest opportunities and start your journey with {{company}}.
jobs.loadError: Unable to load job listings. Please try again later.
jobs.noJobsHint: Try adjusting your search or filters.
jobs.ctaBody: Submit a general application and we'll contact you when a matching position opens.

jobDetail.notFoundBody: This job listing may have been removed or is no longer available.
jobDetail.interestedBody: Submit your application today. Our team will review it and get back to you shortly.

errors.photoRequired: A photo is required. Please go back to the Personal tab and upload your photo.
errors.agreementsRequired: You must agree to all statements in the Review tab before submitting.
errors.captchaRequired: Please complete the "I am not a robot" verification before submitting.
errors.missingDocs: Required document(s) not uploaded: {{docs}}. Please go to the Documents tab.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
errors.photoUploadFailed: Application submitted but photo upload failed. Please contact us to resubmit your photo.
errors.documentsUploadFailed_one: Application submitted, but {{count}} document failed to upload.
errors.documentsUploadFailed_other: Application submitted, but {{count}} documents failed to upload.

applicationSuccess.title: Application Submitted Successfully!
applicationSuccess.body: Thank you for applying to our driver recruitment program. Your application has been received and will be reviewed by our HR team.
applicationSuccess.step1Body: You will receive a confirmation email with your application details and reference number.
applicationSuccess.step2Body: Our recruitment team will review your application within 5-7 business days.
applicationSuccess.step3Body: We will verify your documents and contact you if additional information is needed.
applicationSuccess.importantBody: Please check your email regularly, including your spam folder. We will send all updates regarding your application to the email address you provided.
applicationSuccess.questionsPrefix: Questions about your application? Email us at
